name: Fudge Meltaways
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/2 cup butter and 1 square unsweetened chocolate in a saucepan.
2. Blend granulated sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla, egg, graham cracker crumbs, coconut flakes, and chopped nuts into the chocolate mixture.
3. Mix well and press into an ungreased baking pan (11-1/2 by 7-1/2 inches or 9 by 9 inches).
4. Refrigerate until chilled.
5. Mix 1/4 cup butter, milk, confectioners' sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
6. Spread over the crumb mixture.
7. Chill.
8. Melt 3 squares of unsweetened chocolate and spread evenly over the chilled layers.
9. Chill again.
10. Cut into squares before completely firming up.
Reformatted for Meal Master by: CYGNUS, HCPM52C & C.MINEAH
